name: LIFETIME BRANDS, INC
summary: Lifetime Brands, Inc. is a company that designs, sources, and sells branded kitchenware, tableware, and other products used in the home. The company markets its products under various well-known brands and distributes them through retail channels. Based on the provided excerpt, specific product lines, brands, and business details are contained in Item 1 of the full filing, which was not fully included in this excerpt.
